20 ANSC - Animal Science

ANSC437 Animal Biotechnology (3 Credits)

Key concepts and current issues in animal biotechnology are covered. Current techniques and applications systems as well as social, ethical, and regulatory issues associated with biotechnology will be discussed. Prerequisite: ANSC327; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department.
